status_notes: Not canonically frozen. The bucket_boundaries values below were discovered once from the 2024 completed-game distribution and must never be recomputed, but this contract's *source provenance* is not yet verified against the authoritative full 2024 population -- source_dataset.authoritative_full_source_sha256 is still pending (see atlas_reference/manifest.json's checksum_policy, which currently disables full_source_hashing). This contract must be re-marked 'frozen' only after that hash is recorded and verified; until then it must not be represented as canonically frozen.
purpose: Freeze the total-run bucket boundaries used by atlas.learning.totals_target_builder so they are computed exactly once, from the 2024 discovery season only, and are never recomputed on later runs or influenced by 2025+ outcomes.
usage_restrictions: MUST NOT be used for 2025+ blind validation while status is 'provisional_source_unverified'.
MUST NOT be used in production while status is 'provisional_source_unverified'.

May only be promoted to status 'frozen' once source_dataset.authoritative_full_source_sha256 is recorded (not null/pending) and verified against the full 2024 population that produced percentile_values.

source_dataset.sample_file_sha256_scope: atlas_reference sample file bytes (games slice) only -- this is NOT the authoritative full-population hash and must never be treated as one.
source_dataset.authoritative_full_source_hash_notes: The full 2024 dataset has not been rehashed under atlas_reference/manifest.json's checksum policy (full_source_hashing is currently disabled there). This field must be populated with the verified full-population sha256 before this contract may be marked 'frozen'.

percentile_method: linear interpolation (pandas default, equivalent to numpy 'linear' method) over the completed-game 2024 game_total_runs distribution
boundary_derivation_notes: low_scoring_max_runs is the p25 (bottom-quartile) cut point, taken as-is.
high_scoring_min_runs is p75 + 1 (11 + 1 = 12), i.e. one run above the 75th percentile, so it isolates the top quartile strictly above the median band.
extreme_high_scoring_min_runs is the p90 cut point, taken as-is.
immutability_rules: These boundaries are discovered once from the 2024 completed-game distribution and are never recomputed, regardless of the contract's status.
atlas.learning.totals_target_builder must never recompute percentiles from its runtime inputs.

These 2024-derived boundaries may only be reused for 2025+ blind validation or production once this contract's status is 'frozen' with an authoritative full-source hash attached; see usage_restrictions.
No 2025 or later outcome may be used to compute, adjust, or re-derive these boundaries.
Changing these values requires a new contract_version, not an in-place edit of this file.
